chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-254 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 2250/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 13-05-2024 Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhatti, Advocate for applicant. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Learned counsel for applicant does not press this Application and submits that the applicant would avail remedy before the Family Court by filing Guards & Wards application. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed, in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
